examples: Tom has probably forgotten that toddy is his birthday.
A hot toddy may help you sleep, but beware of mixing alcohol with other cold.
Toddy — a drink made with strong alcohol, sugar, hot water and sometimes spices.
Until about 150 years ago Nadars - mostly "toddy tappers" - were condemned to a near untouchable status.
In Mrs Beeton's Book of Home Management, a best-seller for decades after it was first published in 1861, there is a chapter on first aid and home remedies - including a hot toddy cold treatment.
